name: DANGANRONPA: THH Immersive
description:
1/??? - Trigger Happy Havoc Immersive

MUST READ DESCRIPTION
Don't read the Character Definition for the best user experience. All information you need is here:
Please start a chat with the bot with a direct message from your character! Judging by the tests, it doesn't work otherwise. This bot does not work properly with JLLM, OpenAI ONLY! (since 3.5 works good)
Please watch first lines of 'Day/Time/Location/...' otherwise refresh answer!
Since Janitor's intro determines the length of messages, and a long intro is a forced measure, follow these instructions: set a limited number of maximum tokens. After about 10 messages, when the neural network gets used to answering briefly, you can return the value of maximum tokens to zero to get a complete thought.
Long intro. It is assumed that you are familiar with Danganronpa series. The bot key feature is your free ability to use the tablet (including a map to move around locations, and have access to the rules to try to bypass them).

I'm still considering adding the MonoMachine (and hence MonoCoins, Gifts), so if you're interested, please let me know!
